author: nflaig
content: so prysm only performs duties based on their head views shuffling? I think in that case we also only wanna vote for blocks that are a descendent of the decision block (used to derive the shuffling), any other ptc attestations would be rejected anyways due to `[REJECT] The message's validator index is within the payload committee` if I am not wrong

author: nflaig
content: separate question, what state does prysm use to validate ptc attestations on gossip?

author: potuz
content: If the head state is good (that is equal shufflings or head just need to be processed to the right epoch it uses head, otherwise it searches the cache for states for the blockroot, if it's not there the message is ignored
